barrier.text: The journal is the publication point: a ciphertext tail with no durable mapping is unreachable after recovery.  Conversely, a mapping is written only after its ciphertext range has crossed the data durability barrier.  \texttt{fsync} flushe

X6/O3 answer strict-path practicality without upgrading crash claims.  X6 changes marker/checkpoint publication from filesystem-wide \texttt{syncfs} to marker-file \texttt{fsync} (1,070 retained A2 calls), leaving data and journal barriers.
